query_title: Who Would You Take to a Deserted Island?

recommendations.title: Results
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched personal trainers' lives are upended by the actions of a new, wealthy client.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Lost in London
recommendations.overview: Within the course of a night, Woody Harrelson finds himself in a misadventure in London that winds him up in prison.

recommendations.title: A Cat in Paris
recommendations.overview: A thrilling mystery that unfurls in the alleys and on the rooftops of the French capital, Paris, over the course of one adventurous evening.

recommendations.title: Giant Little Ones
recommendations.overview: Two popular teen boys, best friends since childhood, discover their lives, families, and girlfriends dramatically upended after an unexpected incident occurs on the night of a 17th birthday party.

recommendations.title: You Hurt My Feelings
recommendations.overview: A novelist's longstanding marriage is suddenly upended when she overhears her husband giving his honest reaction to her latest book.

recommendations.title: The Riot Club
recommendations.overview: Two first-year students at Oxford University join a secret society and learn that their reputations can be made or destroyed over the course of one evening.

recommendations.title: Without Saying Goodbye
recommendations.overview: The opposite lives of a workaholic architect and a fiery artist are upended when their chance encounter in breathtaking Peru shifts their views on life.

recommendations.title: Zero for Conduct
recommendations.overview: In a repressive boarding school with rigid rules of behavior, four boys decide to rebel against the director on a celebration day.
